name: Picnic Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 18.5 Ounce Pkg. Chocolate Or Yellow Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cake according to package directions.
2. Spoon batter into 24 greased or paper-lined muffin cups, filling two-thirds full.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, egg and sugar until smooth. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls into the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until cupcakes are done.
